title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to OpsPal's Windows installation experience and Salesforce revenue analysis capabilities. The platform now automatically installs on Windows computers and can discover your organization's custom revenue fields to provide more accurate sales process assessments. Several stability fixes ensure smoother automation runs and better error handling across all integrations.

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of new features
details: OpsPal now automatically generates and publishes weekly release notes so you stay up-to-date on new capabilities and improvements

entries.headline: Automation runs without unnecessary permission blocks
details: Fixed six cases where OpsPal was overly strict about permissions, allowing legitimate operations to proceed smoothly

entries.headline: Quick data lookups work faster without complex routing
details: Simple record lookups and small queries now run directly without extra processing steps

entries.headline: Windows installation handles all dependencies automatically
details: OpsPal now installs Claude Code and Node.js on Windows computers without manual setup steps

entries.headline: Better error detection when automations encounter issues
details: OpsPal now identifies and reports connection problems and configuration errors more clearly

entries.headline: Windows installation script works with all execution methods
details: Fixed compatibility issues when running the installation script through different Windows PowerShell methods

entries.headline: Read-only queries work on production Salesforce orgs
Revenue analysis results save properly for future reference
Custom templates and branding survive platform updates
details: Your customized templates and brand elements now persist safely through OpsPal updates and upgrades

entries.headline: RevOps assessments discover your custom revenue fields
details: OpsPal now automatically finds your organization's custom revenue fields like ARR, ACV, and deal size to provide more accurate sales process analysis

entries.headline: Simplified Windows installation with one-click setup
Smoother onboarding experience with better guidance
Prevent problematic Salesforce deployments before they happen
details: New validation tools catch common deployment issues like picklist conflicts and field history limits before you deploy to production

entries.headline: Automatic scanning prevents accidental credential exposure
Enhanced security scanning protects sensitive information
Removed hardcoded passwords for better security
